entity.description:
Good Man, Good Deeds, Good Rice. Harvested all year round from Northeast Thailand, the region’s climate and fertile fields make it an ideal place for rice planting. Our finest rice grains are produced from these fields using 
state-of-the-art factory equipment. All our rice grains are stored in Singapore’s first and only chilled warehouse. This preservation technique prevents the growth of rice weevils without any usage of chemical fumigation.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
* Please note that the quality of vacuum-packed rice remains unaffected should the packaging not arrive fully vacuum-sealed.
• Stored in SG 1st chilled warehouse without added chemical fumigation
• Savour the best with SongHe Fragrant Rice
• Rice grains are always freshly packed
• Deliver only the most fragrant and quality rice to your homes.

metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Rinse three cups of New Moon Premium Fragrant Organic Rice and drain
2. Add 3.6 cups of fresh water with New Moon Premium Fragrant Organic Rice into rice cooker
3. Start cooking your rice (follow instructions on rice cooker's manual)
4. Allow cooked rice to remain covered for 10 minutes
5. Fluff and serve when it is steaming hot to maintain its aroma and soft texture

product.description: Cultivated in the rich soil of Northeast Thailand coupled with rainwater harvesting techniques, Golden Chef Royale Thai Hom Mali Fragrant Rice is double-polished for a pure and perfectly white appearance. With just one rinse, this aromatic rice serves up a soft and fluffy texture when cooked. Certified by the Royal Thai Government, experience pure fragrance in every meal with Golden Chef Royale Thai Hom Mali Fragrant Rice

metaData.Key Information: Guaranteed premium quality
metaData.Nutritional Data:
AttributesPer Serving (50g)
Energy176kcal*
Protein 3.7g
Total Fat 0.2g
- Saturated Fat 0.1g
- Trans Fat 0.0g
Cholesterol 0mg
Carbohydrate 40.0g
- Total Sugar 0.1g
Dietary Fibre 0.4g
Sodium 0mg
metaData.Preparation:
1. Rinse 3 cups of Golden Chef Royale Thai Hom Mali Fragrant Rice just ONCE.
2. Add 4.5 cups of water (1.5 cups of water per 1 cup of rice) with Golden Chef Royale Thai Hom Mali Fragrant Rice into the rice cooker.
3. Close the lid and start cooking the rice. Do not lift the lid or stir the rice during cooking.
4. Allow the cooked rice to remain covered for 5-10 minutes. Fluff and serve hot.
metaData.SAP Product Name: GOLDEN CHEF ROYALE THAI HOM MALI FRAGRANT RICE 5KG
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct heat and sunlight. Once opened, keep rice in an airtight container.
